name: eslint-plugin-disable-autofix
description: Disable autofix for ESLint rules without turning them off

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp LICENSE dist/LICENSE && cp README.md dist/README.md
scripts.test: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9 && node --test tests/integration.test.js
scripts.ci: npm run build && jest tests/v9 && node --test tests/integration.test.js

author: Mikl Wolfe <wolfe@mikl.io> (https://github.com/chiefmikey)
